scripts.dev: bun --cwd apps/gateway dev & bun --cwd apps/admin dev & bun --cwd apps/enterprise-console dev
scripts.check: bun run check:layers && bun run test:enterprise:smoke && bun --cwd packages/enterprise-contracts check && bun --cwd packages/enterprise-authz check && bun --cwd packages/enterprise-authz test && bun --cwd packages/enterprise-adapter check && bun --cwd packages/svadmin-helpers check && bun --cwd apps/gateway check && bun --cwd apps/gateway test:enterprise && bun --cwd apps/gateway test:postgresx && bun --cwd apps/portal check && bun --cwd apps/admin check && bun --cwd apps/enterprise-console check
scripts.build: bun --cwd apps/portal build && bun --cwd apps/admin build && bun --cwd apps/enterprise-console build
scripts.start: bun --cwd apps/gateway start & bun --cwd apps/admin start
